title: Build the ratified Stage-2 static-long-crypto lambda-bet instrument (variant of the isolated sleeve; no-stop, defined-risk-by-sizing)
source: CEO ratified B0182 2026-06-18 (adaptive static-long-crypto barbell). Explore recon 2026-06-19 confirmed it is a tractable variant of the existing isolated lottery sleeve (netting already solved by the combined-target architecture).
why: B0182 ratified the adaptive static-long-crypto-by-sizing instrument as the Stage-2 posture, superseding the near-inert capped-momentum sleeve. The instrument does not yet exist in the execution layer. Explore (2026-06-19) found the survival book and the isolated lottery sleeve already coexist on the SAME crypto symbols without a netting conflict: live_loop sums book_weights+sleeve_weights per asset into one combined target and reconciles once vs broker truth (live_loop.py ~1423), with held lottery positions PINNED into the target (live_loop.py ~1464). So the new instrument is a VARIANT of the sleeve reusing the hard infra; the changes are entry, sizing, and REMOVAL of the stop/DD-latch.
value_rationale: Critical path to launch (Jun 21 22:00 BST). Without it the ratified Stage-2 posture cannot execute; P(top25) reverts to ~0 (flat book or near-inert sleeve).
scope: VARIANT of the isolated lottery sleeve (pipeline/lottery_sleeve.py + execution/live_loop.py). REUSE: the combined-target reconciliation (book_weights+sleeve_weights summed per asset -> single reconcile vs broker truth), lottery_positions state persistence + restart-safety, joint margin/gross accounting (_account_gross_headroom), arming/schedule plumbing. The netting concern is already solved by this architecture (Explore 2026-06-19).

ENTRY: when armed, immediately go LONG all configured crypto assets (default BTC/ETH/SOL) at the next mark -- NO breakout/noise-floor/confirmation decision (replaces decide_entry). Held to the org mark; no time-based exit.

SIZING: pure NOTIONAL, not risk/stop-based. Total Stage-2 crypto gross = lambda*E split equally across n assets (lambda*E/n each). lambda = effective bet leverage in [1.5, 2.4], HARD ceiling 2.4. Replaces the risk_frac/stop-distance sizing path.

SAFETY MODEL = DEFINED-RISK BY SIZING, NO STOP, NO DD-LATCH (advisor binding verdict 2026-06-18: 'defined-risk by sizing, not a gappable stop, held to the mark'). NOT flattened on drawdown; sized so the worst-case combined-account move cannot trigger sec14. Removing the ATR stop + envelope latch is INTENTIONAL (a stop gaps through in a crash -- the 21:00Z control showed ETH gapping; sizing is the reliable guarantee). It loses most of the time (~90% miss top25) = accepted lottery posture; the only hard requirement is NO sec14 elimination.

sec14 GUARANTEE (hard, fail-closed assertion): combined (survival-book gross + lambda*E crypto) worst-case margin stays above stop-out. Parameterized by margin spec (default notional/30; re-derived at launch vs real spec, B0195) and a worst-case crypto move (default -40%). lambda=2.4 -> margin-call at a -39.7% round move; worst real 2023-2026 move -27.6% -> headroom. If the assertion fails (real margin tighter), scale every lambda down proportionally or refuse to arm.

CRYPTO-EXPOSURE SEMANTICS: lambda defines TOTAL crypto exposure (gross crypto notional / E). While the bet is active, SUPPRESS the survival book's native BTC/ETH/SOL weights so total crypto = the bet only (matches the isolated simulate_barbell.py model; avoids double-exposure beyond lambda). FX/metals book unchanged.

CLI + mid-round adaptation: a --stage2-lambda flag (validated [1.5,2.4]); adjustable mid-round by the runbook 6.1 stop->relaunch->verify->restart mutation procedure (mid-round mod allowed -- own API, no frozen version). Wire into run_survival_live.py.

TESTS to the B0150 74-test standard: reuse the 91-test harness (reconciliation, restart-safety, margin bounds, parity) + ADD static-long cases: arm->enter-long-all-assets; pure-notional sizing = lambda*E/n; NO stop/latch flatten on drawdown (held to mark); the sec14 combined-account assertion (PASS at 2.4/-40%/notional-30, fail-closed when margin tighter); crypto-suppression of the book's native crypto weight; live/backtest parity of the combined target.

GATES before live (B0182): launch-day sec14 re-derive vs real margin (B0195); FRESH risk-officer gate on the new instrument (no-latch held-to-mark 2.4x is aggressive -- MUST be reviewed); re-rehearsal; then amend the frozen launch command (replace --lottery-schedule TS=0.04 with --stage2-lambda 1.5 for R1).
recommendation: Build as a variant sleeve per the Explore map (~80 LOC code + ~200 LOC tests). Hard infra (coexistence/reconciliation/restart/margin) reused; changes = entry, sizing, removal of stop/latch. Dispatch execution-engineer TDD, then a fresh risk-officer gate. The aggressive no-latch design is per the advisor's binding verdict + matches the sim that produced P(top25)=0.10.
out_of_scope: The survival-book base (seeded-history, thin caps, kill-switch, FX/metals sizing) -- unchanged. An automated 5-min-feed field-monitor (lambda is set by operator relaunch per the pre-registered runbook 6.4 thresholds, not auto-read).

external_refs.note: section 6.4 = the ratified posture + pre-registered lambda thresholds
the sim that produced P(top25)=0.10; the instrument must match its held-to-mark model

history.reason: Spec'd from the CEO B0182 ratification + the 2026-06-19 Explore recon. Build dispatched to execution-engineer.

Build dispatched to execution-engineer (TDD variant sleeve).

execution-engineer TDD build DONE (variant sleeve, additive). New pipeline/stage2_lambda.py (pure-notional sizing lambda*E/n + fail-closed combined-account section14 guarantee citing simulate_barbell margin math). live_loop.stage2_tick: arm->enter-LONG-all immediately, NO stop/NO DD-latch, HELD-to-mark; crypto-suppression of book native crypto in the combined target; held legs EXEMPT from the risk_check DD/kill flatten (FX/metals still flatten). PaperBroker optional margin_div models notional/30 envelope. CLI --stage2-lambda [1.5,2.4] + mutual-exclusion vs momentum sleeve. 71 new tests (stage2 lambda/state/live/parity/cli/banner + paper_broker_margin_div), incl section14-boundary + held-to-mark equity-path parity to 1e-6 vs simulate_barbell, and combined-target FX parity vs book-only backtest. Affected-surface set (268 tests incl original parity + all lottery + leverage gates) rc=0; full suite exit 0. RISK-OFFICER FLAGS: (1) no-DD-latch held-to-mark is intentional per spec/advisor but means a held bet rides the book DD/kill breach unflattened (FX book still protected); (2) at lambda=2.4/-40% the combined section14 guard SCALES lambda down to ~2.341 (book g=0.5 folded as maintenance) -> NOT armed at 2.4 in a strict -40% envelope, fail-closed; (3) total account gross ~2.46x at lambda=2.0 (lambda crypto + ~0.46 book). Frozen launch command NOT amended (awaits risk gate).

Risk-officer PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT close-out (2 items): (1) DOC -- arm-time banner + --stage2-lambda help + band-error now state the -40% S14 guarantee is CONDITIONAL on a near-flat book at the deepest crypto print (book folded as maintenance reserve, not a simultaneous directional loss); rule: lambda<=2.0 robust at -0.40, arm lambda>2.0 with --stage2-worst-case-move -0.45. (2) REGRESSION -- new tests/test_stage2_effective_lambda.py (18 cases, lambda{1.5,2.0,2.4} x n{1,3} x M{20,25,30}) asserts effective deployed lambda == intended post-S14 lambda; REVEALED a real unit-mix clip (single-leg bet clipped to lambda=1.0 because _account_gross_headroom min()-d a NOTIONAL ceiling against margin_free, a margin qty). Fixed: convert margin_free to margin-implied notional (margin_free*M) before the min. Full suite 2792 passed, exit 0.

risk-officer (Opus) GATE 2026-06-19 = PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, NO pre-arm code blockers. Independently re-ran 478 tests green; full suite exit 0 (2773). Verified: sec14 math EXACT-parity to simulate_barbell.margin_call_crypto_move (1e-12) + held-to-mark equity path matches 1+lambda*cum (1e-6) -> this IS the instrument P(top25)=0.10 was measured on; section14_safe_lambda fail-closed (scales lambda down / refuses); all 3 engineer-flagged items SOUND (held-to-mark DD/kill exemption correct - FX/metals book still flattens, held crypto rides to org mark; combined gross ~2.46x at lambda=2.0, single-instrument share ~0.27<0.85, only sec13 cost = accepted net-directional -10; crypto-suppression no double-count, SSOT untouched, restart-safe). ONE HIGH-SEV (launch-day setting, NOT a code bug): the combined sec14 guard folds the book only as MAINTENANCE reserve not as a simultaneous directional loss -> at lambda~2.4/-40% the cushion is ~1bp and a simultaneous ~5% book loss would breach sec14. At the realistic worst (-27.6%) cushion is huge. FIX = launch-day operator setting: deploy lambda<=2.0 OR arm 2.4 with --stage2-worst-case-move -0.45 (effective ~2.10, breach -45.8%); plus fix the banner/help prose. must_fix: [pre-arm code: NONE; launch-day: (a) lambda<=2.0 or worst-case-move -0.45, (b) B0195 real margin re-derive via --stage2-margin-div + confirm banner, (c) doc/banner prose caveat, (d) re-rehearsal of the amended command]. Hardening pass (prose caveat + deployed-lambda regression test) dispatched.

Pre-rehearsal 2026-06-19 (paper --dry-run, scratch state-root; mt5 path blocked by the safety classifier as it reads as a live deploy -> validated on paper, classifier-safe). DRAFTED R1 launch command: swap the capped sleeve (--lottery-schedule TS=0.04 x3 + --lottery-envelope-dd-frac 0.5 + --lottery-assets) for --lottery-arm --lottery-event-time 2026-06-21T21:00:00+00:00 --stage2-lambda 1.5 --stage2-assets BTCUSD,ETHUSD,SOLUSD --stage2-refuse-if-unsafe; survival-book base (mt5/--no-dry-run/--loop/seed flags/--portfolio-kill 0.045) UNCHANGED. CONFIRMED: command parses (all validators pass); the [stage2] arm-time sec14 banner prints correct numbers (lambda=1.5 -> breach at -65.5% crypto round; combined-safe ceiling 2.341 folding book gross 0.50; the conditional-guarantee caveat + 'lambda>2.0 use --stage2-worst-case-move -0.45' robustness rule both live; lambda=1.5 deploys unscaled, no haircut); book sizes the 8 incumbents exactly as frozen (gross 0.429x, eff-bets 3.10, crypto var 24.6%, 7 thin at 0.0000). With a future event-time the bet is correctly PENDING. TWO findings: (1) stage-2 ENTRY is in the fast-tick/--loop path (stage2_tick live_loop.py:1595 calls _maybe_arm_stage2), NOT a single book cycle -> the no-loop rehearsal correctly shows pending; entry/sizing/suppression are test-covered (test_stage2_live/parity) + fire live under --loop (launch-day mt5 --loop re-rehearsal confirms). (2) LOAD-BEARING GAP for the adaptive policy: arm_stage2 (state.py:532) REFUSES re-arm while a leg is open, and the held qty is pinned -> lambda CANNOT be changed for R2/R3 while the R1 bet is held; there is no clean stage-2 flatten/resize operator action. Per-round lambda change needs flatten-then-re-arm; the flatten path is the gap. Needs an engineer follow-up (a stage-2 round-boundary flatten+resize / --stage2-disarm) BEFORE the R2 cut (Jun 22 22:00 BST), else the adaptive policy degrades to a single fixed R1 lambda held to the final. Also: with stage-2 the --portfolio-kill governs only the FX/metals book flatten (held crypto exempt) -> revisit whether 0.045 is the right book-kill value (crypto vol at lambda=1.5 will trip it readily). Surfaced; not auto-resolved.

Dispatched execution-engineer 2026-06-19 to close the adaptive-policy gap: (P0) a stage-2 round-boundary ROLL = at/after a NEW reached arm window with a held leg, flatten the held bet (realize round P&L into equity) then re-arm+re-enter at the new lambda against carried equity (per-round reset, matches simulate_barbell build_one_round); gated on now>=new event_ts, idempotent on same event_ts, sec14 re-check at new lambda, dry-run-preview + banner, restart-safe; held-to-mark WITHIN a round unchanged. (P1) book-kill analysis (NO unilateral risk change): quantify how often --portfolio-kill 0.045 (combined-account, dominated by the held crypto bet's MtM) flattens the FX/metals book at lambda 1.5/2.0/2.4, and recommend the value AND whether to compute the kill on BOOK-ONLY day-loss (excluding held stage-2 P&L) so it protects the book from a real book DD not the intentional bet (sec14 is sizing-governed, independent of the kill) -> surface for CEO + the next risk gate.

execution-engineer TDD build DONE (additive). P0 round-boundary ROLL: live_loop._maybe_roll_stage2 + stage2_tick wiring -- at a REACHED new arm window (event_ts != held lottery_event_ts) with a held leg + stage2_lambda>0, FLATTEN the held legs (realize round P&L into carried equity) then arm_stage2 at the new lambda against post-flatten equity; next tick enters at new lambda. Gated on now>=new event_ts (broker cursor = replay-stable clock, _now() fallback); idempotent on same event_ts; new-lambda section14 re-check honored (scales down / refuses, prior round still flattened); dry-run previews would-roll w/ broker UNCHANGED (ledger+arm persist only); restart-safe (same event_ts no roll, new event_ts rolls); [stage2] ROLL banner; FX/metals book untouched; held-to-mark WITHIN a round unchanged. Matches simulate_barbell.build_one_round (re-strike per round vs carried equity). 10 new tests (tests/test_stage2_roll.py); full suite 2802 passed / 0 failed / 0 error (junitxml), exit 0. AUTOMATIC-on-reached-new-event_ts (no extra confirm flag added -- see report). P1 book-kill: ANALYSIS ONLY, no code change -- at K=0.045 the combined-account kill trips on ordinary crypto noise (lam=2.0: -2.25%% basket day = ~23%% of days; lam=2.4: -1.875%% = ~27%%) while a genuine book DD is ~12sigma at 4.5%% (book daily sigma ~0.38%%) -> RECOMMEND computing the kill on BOOK-ONLY day-loss (exclude held stage-2 P&L) + keep K~0.015 for the book; section14-safety unaffected (sizing-governed). RISK-OFFICER MUST RE-REVIEW: the round-boundary FLATTEN is a deliberate capital action (realizes round P&L, re-strikes lambda vs carried equity) + the P1 book-only kill change is risk-gated.

risk-officer (Opus) 2026-06-19 on the round-boundary ROLL + book-only-kill design = PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, NO hard pre-arm code blockers (re-ran 2802 green + a live equity-lock coincidence probe). Roll core mechanics correct, fail-closed, sim-faithful, FX/metals book untouched, idempotent/restart-safe. TWO MEDIUM (recommended before live): (1) NO confirm gate on the automatic live flatten -> fat-fingered new event_ts auto-flattens the round; remediate via a hard launch-day dry-run-preview+read-back gate OR a --stage2-confirm-roll flag. (2) UNTESTED interaction: equity-lock 'all' flatten + reached boundary -> the roll RE-ARMS a deliberately-locked-flat account (probe: no leg re-opens, open_allowed=False holds -> SAFE but a latent footgun); fix = one-line guard at top of _maybe_roll_stage2 'if self._equity_lock_check(): return None' + a test (risk-officer would take it before live). LOW: clock split (selector _now() vs roll cursor) -> spurious '[stage2] arm REFUSED' log-noise during REPLAY at the boundary (benign, doesn't bite live MT5). BOOK-ONLY-KILL DESIGN = APPROVED (sound + sec14-independent; K~0.015 reasonable, 12sigma vs ~0.38%/day book sigma) BUT REQUIRE a residual COMBINED-account backstop above any sec14-safe held-crypto DD (~-15% to -20%, CEO call) so book-only never removes the last combined brake; risk-altering -> MUST return through a fresh risk gate once coded. Roll committed; book-kill NOT yet coded.

Dispatched 2026-06-19 (parallel): (1) quant-phd-advisor (Opus) on the residual-backstop methodology question — does a combined-account catastrophe-flatten belong on a defined-risk-by-sizing held-to-mark instrument (risk-officer wants one; tension with the advisor's 'no gappable stop' + it would trip on normal bet variance at lambda>=1.5), at what level if any, reconcile with the P(top25)=0.10 instrument; (2) execution-engineer on the two net-safe roll fixes the risk-officer flagged: equity-lock guard at top of _maybe_roll_stage2 (locked account must never re-arm) + test, and a --stage2-confirm-roll fat-finger gate (roll REFUSES without explicit authorization, fail-safe = hold prior lambda, no accidental flatten) + tests. Book-only-kill IMPLEMENTATION waits on the advisor ruling, then a fresh risk gate.

execution-engineer TDD DONE (2 net-safe roll fixes, additive). FIX1 equity-lock guard: _maybe_roll_stage2 returns None immediately if _equity_lock_check() truthy -> a deliberately-locked-flat account never re-arms/re-strikes/advances event_ts. FIX2 fat-finger gate: new SurvivalBookConfig.stage2_confirm_roll + --stage2-confirm-roll CLI flag (default OFF, fail-safe); a reached new event_ts REFUSES the live roll (no flatten, loud [ALARM] ... ROLL REFUSED ... --stage2-confirm-roll, prior round lambda HELD) unless the flag is set; R1 first-arm unaffected; DRY-RUN still previews the would-roll regardless. 7 new tests (5 in test_stage2_roll.py: equity-lock-coincidence no-roll/no-rearm, refused-without-flag+ALARM, proceeds-with-flag, dry-run-previews-without-flag, first-arm-unaffected; 2 in test_stage2_cli.py: off-by-default, flows-to-config). 7 pre-existing live-roll tests updated to pass stage2_confirm_roll=True (authorize the flatten). Full suite uv run pytest -q: 2809 passed / 0 failed / 0 error (junitxml), exit 0; live/backtest + stage2 held-to-mark parity green. Held-to-mark within-round + FX/metals book unaffected. NOT touched: portfolio-kill / book-kill (separate advisor-gated change in flight).

quant-phd-advisor (Opus) BINDING ruling 2026-06-19 on the residual-backstop question. (1) REJECT a -15% to -20% combined-account DD flatten (the risk-officer's level): gappable on the crash path, trips on NORMAL bet variance (-10% crypto round = -20% equity at lambda=2.0), destroys the convex held-to-mark payoff = the P(top25)=0.10 reason to exist, buys ZERO sec14 protection in the lambda<=2.0 region (margin math already cannot reach a call). (2) SHIP book-only-kill K~0.015 on the FX/metals book (APPROVED). (3) sec14-safety stays in the SIZING (lambda<=2.0 default; lambda>2.0 only with --stage2-worst-case-move -0.45; B0195 re-derive) -- complete sec14 story for all historically plausible paths (worst real -27.6% vs breach -48.3% at lambda=2.0). (4) The non-zero combined brake the risk-officer requires = a sec14-SURVIVAL guard NOT a DD stop: flatten crypto only at ~80% of the distance to the margin-call move (~-38.6% at lambda=2.0, ~-31.7% at lambda=2.4); never fires at historically observed moves so P(top25) untouched; best-effort (gappable) insurance vs a model-breaking margin surprise, NOT the guarantee (sizing is). Second choice: pure-sizing + book-only-kill no backstop (also defensible). NOT acceptable: the -15-20% DD stop. Decisive conditioning gap = B0195 (real launch margin spec). -> IMPLEMENTING book-only-kill + the 80%-of-margin-call sec14-survival guard; then a fresh risk gate. Roll fixes (equity-lock guard + --stage2-confirm-roll) DONE, suite 2809 green.

execution-engineer TDD DONE (P0+P1, additive, advisor binding ruling 2026-06-19). P0 BOOK-ONLY portfolio-kill: risk_check computes daily_loss on book-only equity when a stage-2 bet is HELD (subtracts held-leg marked P&L from equity + new persisted state.sod_stage2_pnl snapshot from sod), so the kill measures the FX/metals book own DD not the bet MtM; stage2 OFF -> bit-for-bit unchanged; --portfolio-kill stays CLI-config (launch 0.015 set at launch). P1 §14-SURVIVAL guard (NOT a DD stop): _maybe_stage2_survival_guard flattens ALL held crypto (overrides held-to-mark) only at frac*c*(λ) basket adverse move; new --stage2-liq-guard-frac default 0.80 (-38.6% λ2.0 / -31.7% λ2.4); never fires at worst real -27.6%; best-effort/gappable, loud [ALARM] + arm banner. 15 new tests; full suite 2824 passed/0 fail/0 err exit 0; parity + held-to-mark within-round + FX book unchanged; roll logic untouched. RISK-OFFICER FRESH GATE NEXT (risk-altering): book-only kill removes the bet from the only combined brake -> residual combined protection is now the §14-survival guard + sizing (advisor rejected a -15/-20% DD stop); guard is best-effort/gappable not a guarantee; threshold keyed off armed nominal λ (conservative).

risk-officer (Opus) FINAL gate 2026-06-19 = BLOCK on ONE high-sev pre-arm bug; everything else PROCEED-worthy. BUG: the round-boundary ROLL corrupts the book-only kill for the rest of the same UTC day -- sod_stage2_pnl is snapshotted ONLY at the UTC day-roll (state.roll_session_equity) but _maybe_roll_stage2 realizes a round's P&L into balance MID-DAY on that same UTC day -> the realized round P&L leaks into the book-only metric as a phantom book move (losing round -> spuriously TRIPS the FX-book kill; winning round -> BLINDS it to a real book DD). New roll x book-kill interaction, not tested together. FIX (risk-officer's exact remediation): on a successful roll, re-baseline state.sod_equity = post-flatten equity AND state.sod_stage2_pnl = 0.0, persist both + a both-directions regression test. PASSED otherwise: sec14-survival guard at frac=0.80 SATISFIES the required non-zero combined brake (fires strictly inside c*(lambda) at every lambda: -38.6% vs -48.3% at 2.0, -31.7% vs -39.7% at 2.4; never fires at worst real -27.6% -> P(top25) untouched; 0.80 is the right default, don't loosen below ~0.65); book-only P&L attribution correct + held-leg exemption sound; the two roll fixes close the prior #1/#2; at lambda<=2.0 + book-only-kill firing the FX book at -1.5% + sizing, sec14 is unreachable on every non-model-breaking path. MEDIUM (recommended): add (0,1] validation on --stage2-liq-guard-frac (a typo silently disables the guard). Fix BLOCK + frac-validation dispatched; re-gate to follow -> then PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT per the risk-officer. Launch-day gates (b): lambda<=2.0, --portfolio-kill 0.015 book-only + amend runbook command, B0195 margin re-derive, MT5 --loop re-rehearsal.

execution-engineer TDD DONE (final-gate BLOCK #1 + MEDIUM #2). BLOCK#1: new LiveState.rebaseline_book_anchor(equity) sets sod_equity=post-flatten equity + sod_stage2_pnl=0.0 + persists; called in _maybe_roll_stage2 on a SUCCESSFUL roll (live AND dry-run, broker untouched; sod_date untouched so normal UTC-day-roll stays bit-for-bit unchanged). 4 new tests tests/test_stage2_roll_book_kill.py: winning-roll does NOT blind the book kill to a real -50k book DD (verified RED without fix); losing-roll does NOT spuriously trip on the realized round loss (verified RED); roll re-anchors sod + persists restart-safe; no-roll day does NOT re-anchor. MEDIUM#2: (0,1] range check on --stage2-liq-guard-frac in run_survival_live (fail-closed via self.error; rejects <=0 inert + >1 useless); 5 new CLI tests (reject 0/-0.1/1.01, accept 0.80/1.0). Full suite uv run pytest -q: 2833 passed / 0 failed / 0 error, exit 0; live/backtest parity + stage2 held-to-mark parity green. No change to the section14-survival-guard logic or book-only P&L attribution beyond the re-baseline. Re-gate next.

RE-GATE (risk-officer, Opus) 2026-06-19 of the BLOCK fix = PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT, NO pre-arm code blockers. Verified the fix closes the bug (neutered rebaseline_book_anchor -> both regression tests go RED with the exact symptoms; restored -> green), normal UTC-day-roll path bit-for-bit unchanged (sod_date untouched), restart-safe, the dry-run anchor coherent + capital-harmless, frac validation fail-closes. One LOW: the book-only-kill + held-exempt story has only run on PaperBroker -> carry forward the launch-day MT5 --loop re-rehearsal. BUILD COMPLETE: commits c0d551c (instrument) + ed8a059 (per-round roll) + b8d8bd4 (safety layer: roll fixes + book-only kill + sec14-survival guard + the BLOCK fix). Full suite 2833 green, parity green, sec14 exact-parity to the sim. Runbook 6.4 updated: BUILD COMPLETE status + DRAFT R1 launch command (--portfolio-kill 0.015 book-only + --stage2-lambda 1.5 + --stage2-liq-guard-frac 0.80 + --stage2-refuse-if-unsafe, replacing the capped sleeve) + the per-round roll procedure (relaunch with new event-time + new lambda + --stage2-confirm-roll). REMAINING = launch-day operator gates ONLY: (1, B0195) real-margin re-derive via --stage2-margin-div; (H) lambda<=2.0 or --stage2-worst-case-move -0.45 for lambda>2.0; (R) MT5 --loop re-rehearsal; then freeze the command into survival_run.bat. No code work remains.

PM 2026-06-19 fixed a LAUNCH FOOTGUN in operations-runbook.md section 7 (go-live decision gate): the 'Sleeve ARMED' checklist item still instructed the operator to arm the SUPERSEDED section 6.3 capped sleeve (--lottery-schedule 0.04 / --portfolio-kill 0.045 / --lottery-envelope-dd-frac 0.5 / flat finals) even though section 6.4 (B0182 RATIFIED 2026-06-18) replaced it with the static-long-crypto lambda-bet. Rewrote the item to the ratified posture (--stage2-lambda 1.5 + --stage2-assets BTC/ETH/SOL + --stage2-liq-guard-frac 0.80 + --stage2-refuse-if-unsafe + book-only --portfolio-kill 0.015; per-round roll via relaunch + --stage2-confirm-roll; launch-day gates B0195/lambda<=2.0/MT5--loop re-rehearsal) so an operator following section 7 arms the correct instrument. Doc-consistency fix aligning to an already-ratified decision (NOT a new decision). runbook edit left UNCOMMITTED (entangled with prior-session in-flight runbook changes) -> for a deliberate commit.
